prompt:
Create a clean, minimalist fashion outfit breakdown infographic on a soft beige background. On the left side, a full-body stylish young woman GIVEN IN REFRANCE IMAGE taking a mirror selfie with a smartphone. She has long wavy dark brown hair, natural glowing makeup, gold earrings, and a luxury casual aesthetic. She wears an oversized taupe-beige button-up shirt layered over a black cropped camisole, high-waisted wide-leg black trousers, white platform sneakers, a black leather shoulder bag with gold hardware, and delicate gold jewelry (watch, necklace, earrings, ring).

On the right side, display organized outfit components in rounded rectangular cards with subtle borders and shadows. Include labeled sections: HAIR, SHIRT, TOP, PANTS, BAG, SNEAKERS, and ACCESSORIES. Each section shows a clean isolated product image matching the outfit. Accessories include gold hoop earrings, pendant necklace, gold wristwatch, and ring.

Editorial fashion magazine layout, Pinterest aesthetic, capsule wardrobe style, neutral color palette, luxury minimalist fashion guide, soft studio lighting, ultra-clean composition, high-end e-commerce presentation, realistic fabric textures, elegant typography, symmetrical spacing, premium lifestyle branding, 4K quality, highly detailed, photorealistic.

Negative Prompt:

low quality, blurry, extra limbs, distorted hands, bad anatomy, cluttered background, watermark, logo, duplicate items, messy layout, excessive accessories, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, cropped body, text errors, misplaced labels, cartoon, illustration, CGI, unrealistic proportions.
